name: Crawling Age vs. Temperature
description: Average crawling age (weeks) vs. average outdoor temperature (°F) at 6 months. n=12 birth months. IMS Ch. 7.
studyDescription: Average crawling age and average outdoor temperature at 6 months for infants grouped by birth month. Data were collected for 12 birth-month cohorts, with crawling age determined by parent report. This is an observational ecological study using aggregated data.

variableDescriptions.temperature: Average outdoor temperature in degrees Fahrenheit during the month when the birth cohort reached 6 months of age
variableDescriptions.avg_crawling_age: Average age at which infants in the birth-month cohort first crawled, in weeks

sourceDetail: OpenIntro IMS Ch. 7, openintro::babies_crawl. Original study from Benson, J.B. (1993). 'Season of birth and onset of locomotion.' Infant Behavior and Development, 16(1), 69-81.

context.parameter: slope of crawling age on temperature
